/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/BgaManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/BmsonLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/ChartProjector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/JudgeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/NoteRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/PlayEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneDecision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneModeSelect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneOption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/ScenePlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneResult.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneSelect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneSelectView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneSideSelect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SceneTitle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/ScoreManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SongManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/SoundManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GeminiRhythm.dir/VirtualFolderManager.cpp.o -o GeminiRhythm   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib /usr/local/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /usr/local/lib/libavcodec.dylib /usr/local/lib/libavformat.dylib /usr/local/lib/libavutil.dylib /usr/local/lib/libswscale.dylib /usr/local/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreAudio
